description: Catalogue feels stale; no new content perceived in last six months
verbatim_quote: I'm doing the same workouts I was doing in October.

description: Strength training library is too small and only beginner level
verbatim_quote: if you're into weightlifting there's like twelve classes total. And the ones that are there are beginner level.

description: Prior feedback (calls and survey) appears to have been ignored
verbatim_quote: I even filled out that survey you sent last year. Nothing changed.

description: Perceived value drop at $29.99 given static library
verbatim_quote: I'm basically paying thirty bucks a month for a library that doesn't change.

description: Duplicate $29.99 charge from system fault on Feb 8
verbatim_quote: I just got charged twice this month and I need this sorted out right now.

description: January charge processed on wrong date, causing $35 overdraft fee
verbatim_quote: That cost me $35 in bank fees because your system charged me on the 3rd instead of the 8th.

description: Refund timeline (3-5 business days) feels punitive against instant debit
verbatim_quote: You took the money instantly but it takes a week to give it back?

description: Too much value is gated behind Premium versus Basic
verbatim_quote: half the good classes are Premium-only... it's getting hard to justify.

description: Yin yoga catalogue is too small and sessions are too short
verbatim_quote: you have almost no yin yoga content. like there are maybe 3 yin classes total.

description: No restorative yoga or yoga nidra content
verbatim_quote: theres a whole world of slower practice thats just missing from the platform

description: Search/tag filters too broad to find specific class attributes
verbatim_quote: theres no way to filter that specifically. the tags are too broad

description: Refund promised on Feb 10 still not visible on Feb 13 (held in manual review queue)
verbatim_quote: The duplicate charge refund ($29.99) has NOT appeared in my account

description: Email to billing@streamfit.com received no response
verbatim_quote: I've had zero response to my email to billing@ about the $35 overdraft refund

description: Cumulative trust erosion from repeated billing failures
verbatim_quote: it makes me feel like I'm being taken for a ride.

description: Samsung TV app crashes mid-class on 2021 model (fourth time in one month)
verbatim_quote: the whole app just froze and then kicked me out.

description: Crashes cause loss of workout streak; customer must call support to restore
verbatim_quote: Forty-two days in a row and it broke because your app crashed.

description: Customer cannot keep calling for each crash recovery
verbatim_quote: I can't keep

description: Premium price increase to $34.99
verbatim_quote: The price increase to $34.99 was the first one.

description: Departure of flagship HIIT trainer Coach Daniels with no replacement
verbatim_quote: Coach Daniels left, which gutted me because his HIIT series was my primary workout.

description: Samsung TV app crashing during live classes
verbatim_quote: last week the app crashed twice during live classes on my Samsung TV.

description: No social/community features for shared challenges with friends
verbatim_quote: they can see each other's workout streaks and compete. Does StreamFit have anything like that?

description: Perception that the platform is going backwards
verbatim_quote: It feels like the platform is going backwards, not forwards.

description: Cancellation request never propagated from account system to billing system; charged twice post-cancellation
verbatim_quote: I've been charged $29.99 in January AND February. That's sixty dollars taken from my account after I cancelled.

description: Two prior support contacts noted refund but never executed it
verbatim_quote: Both times I was told "it'll be sorted" and both times nothing happened.

description: Cumulative trust destroyed; will not recommend
verbatim_quote: this has completely destroyed my trust. I would never recommend you to anyone based on this.

description: No opt-out for aggregated/anonymised data contribution to general AI model
verbatim_quote: I'd prefer to opt out entirely. Is that possible?

description: Privacy controls perceived as not keeping pace with industry expectations
verbatim_quote: people are getting very nervous about where their data ends up.
